title: Sour and Spicy Kabanos Stir Fry
description: A quick and spicy stir fry with crispy kabanos and a tangy twist. Serve as a snack or light lunch.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the kabanos and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
3. Remove the kabanos from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add another tablespoon of oil to the skillet.
5. Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Add the garlic and chili flakes to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
7. Add the cooked kabanos back to the skillet and stir to combine.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot with a dollop of sour cream.
